name: Eggs with Peppers and Tomato Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1 tablespoon of the oil in a medium skillet, preferably non-stick. Add onion; cook over medium heat until it begins to soften, about 3 to 4 minutes. Add bell peppers and garlic; cook for 2 minutes. Add vinegar, salt, and pepper. Reduce to low heat and cook until vegetables are soft, about 4 to 5 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in basil. The dish can be prepared ahead of time; gently reheat on the stove or in the microwave before serving.
2. Meanwhile, brush the bread with remaining olive oil. Arrange on a baking sheet and bake at 400 degrees until lightly browned, about 4 to 5 minutes; set aside.
3. Combine marinara sauce and cream in a small saucepan or microwave-safe dish; cook until heated through.
4. To serve, divide vegetable mixture over toasted bread slices. Top each with an egg and marinara sauce. Sprinkle cheese over and serve immediately.
